title: andrographis beddomei
intro: Andrographis beddomei, also known as the Kerala or Indian spurge, is a plant species within the family Acanthaceae and is native to India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds. It is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Andrographis beddomei is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
